name: DropdownColumnActions
description: Per-column action menu opened from a TableHeaderCell's on-hover chevron. Seven rows: Sort ascending / Sort descending / Filter / Pin (or Unpin) / Move left / Move right / Hide column. Locked columns show a REDUCED 3-row menu (Sort×2 + Filter only). Every mutation should round-trip through shared table state so DropdownSorting / DropdownColumns / Filters row stay in sync.

props.name: sortState
props.description: Current sort state for this column. Highlights the matching Sort row via selected={true} (info-subtle fill).

props.name: pinned
props.description: Whether the column is pinned. Flips the Pin row's text (Pin column / Unpin column) and paints info-subtle when true.

props.name: canMoveLeft
props.description: Whether 'Move left' is enabled. When false, the row's onClick is omitted (no activation).

props.name: canMoveRight
props.description: Whether 'Move right' is enabled. When false, the row's onClick is omitted (no activation).

props.name: locked
props.description: Whether the column is locked (matches ColumnItem.locked from DropdownColumns). When true: only the Sort ascending / Sort descending / Filter rows render; Pin / Move-left / Move-right / Hide are omitted because those mutations are forbidden by the locked contract.

props.name: onSortAsc
props.description: Called when 'Sort ascending' is clicked. Consumer should set the table's sort column + direction and sync DropdownSorting.

props.name: onSortDesc
props.description: Called when 'Sort descending' is clicked. Consumer should set the table's sort column + direction and sync DropdownSorting.

props.name: onFilter
props.description: Called when 'Filter' is clicked. Consumer should focus the matching FilterChip in the Filters row, auto-creating one with default value if it doesn't exist yet.

props.name: onPin
props.description: Called when 'Pin column' / 'Unpin column' is clicked. Consumer should flip the column's pinned flag and sync DropdownColumns.

props.name: onMoveLeft
props.description: Called when 'Move left' is clicked. Consumer should reorder the column and sync DropdownColumns.

props.name: onMoveRight
props.description: Called when 'Move right' is clicked. Consumer should reorder the column and sync DropdownColumns.

props.name: onHide
props.description: Called when 'Hide column' is clicked. Consumer should move the column from Shown to Hidden in DropdownColumns.

states.rationale: Panel itself is passive — no panel-level hover/pressed/focus. Each composed <ListItem type="with-slots"> carries the standard hybrid contract: overlay hover, info-subtle fill on selected (Sort active and pinned rows), OKLCH L-shift on selected+hover. Locked variant just omits the Pin/Move/Hide rows.

keyboard.Tab: Move focus to the next action row
keyboard.Shift+Tab: Move focus to the previous action row
keyboard.Enter: Activate the focused action row (native button)
keyboard.Space: Same as Enter for native buttons

accessibility.focusManagement: Each action row is a <ListItem type="with-slots"> rendered as a native <button> (the with-slots variant is auto-interactive). Lucide icons inside are aria-hidden via the ListItem icon slot. Sort-active and pinned rows expose aria-selected="true" via the ListItem selected prop. Disabled Move rows carry aria-disabled="true" + data-disabled="" — they remain focusable so AT announces them as disabled, but their onClick is omitted (no activation). The visual treatment uses --dls-color-text-disabled + not-allowed cursor + suppressed hover overlay.

propertyMapping.note: Always present (even in locked variant). Consumer should focus the matching FilterChip; auto-create one if absent.
Text flips between 'Pin column' / 'Unpin column' based on pinned. Omitted when locked=true.
Omitted when locked=true. Gated by canMoveLeft.
Omitted when locked=true. Gated by canMoveRight.
When true: only Sort ascending / Sort descending / Filter rows render. Sets data-locked="" on the root for styling hooks.

useWhen: Inside a TableHeaderCell's floatingMenu slot, triggered by the cell's on-hover chevron Button (onMenuClick callback)
Any per-column action menu where sort / filter / reorder / hide controls are needed in one popover
doNotUseFor: Functional / utility columns (checkbox selection, row expansion, drag handle) — those columns should not opt into onMenuClick
Bulk column visibility / order management → use DropdownColumns
Filter values → use DropdownFilters / the FilterChip value popover

knownDeviations.description: Spec mentions --dls-color-component-dropdown-column-actions-* tokens but they do not exist in tokens.json. CSS uses ListItem token families directly.
